chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sequence of the Rituals of Hajj

text:
[النظر إلى الكعبة]
فإذا دخلت المسجد فانظر إلى الكعبة وقل: " الحمد لله الذي عظمك وشرفك وكرمك وجعلك مثابة للناس وأمنا مباركا وهدى للعالمين ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
GAZING AT THE KAABA
When you enter the mosque and set your gaze upon the Kaaba, say:
"All praise is due to Allah (swt), who has exalted you, honored you, ennobled you, and made you a place of return for the people, a sanctuary, a blessing, and a guidance for the worlds."
